description.value:
A jumbo-sized shotgun shell, loaded with sharp metal bits instead of buckshot. This comes at the cost of gradually destroying the weapon it's fired from, but scavs don't tend to care about consequences.

Can only be fired from a @UUID[Compendium.night-city-gang-and-corp-mook-pack.NCGangsnCorpsItems22.bzxi77QrqnZcV1Pr]{Shrapnel Cannon}.

Functions as the unholy combination of armor piercing and expansive ammunition, fired with the AoE of a shotgun shell. Increases the shell damage to 4d6. Doubles ablation to armor, and when you inflict a critical injury using this ammunition, the victim suffers the Foreign Object critical injury in addition to any other injuries rolled. Bonus damage is still only dealt once.
